mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS "id", a.parent_id AS "parentId", a.name AS "name" FROM sys_area a where a.del_flag = '0'
and a.parent_id = #{parent.id}

SELECT a.id AS "id", a.parent_id AS "parentId", a.name AS "name" FROM sys_area a
a.del_flag = '0' and (
a.id = #{id} OR a.parent_ids LIKE #{idLike} )
order by a.id
SELECT a.id AS "id", a.parent_id AS "parentId", a.name AS "name" FROM sys_area a where a.del_flag = '0' order by a.id
